creditsPerEuro.title: Credits Per Euro
creditsPerEuro.description: Global exchange rate that defines how many credits one euro of token cost equals. Applies to all usage-based subscriptions.
creditsPerEuro.label: Credits per Euro

creditsPerEuro.hint: Changing this value only affects future usage records. Historical records retain their original credit values.
